title: Antra - An Open Mic Experience by SocialSpot Exp
Heritage Walk at Jaigarh Cannon Foundry
caption_full:
"Jaigarh's Cannon Foundry stands as a testament to the ingenuity and technical expertise that made the fort one of the region's foremost centres of artillery production.

Join us for a guided Cannon Foundry Walkthrough with Ram Krishna Sharma and discover the stories behind this extraordinary space, its remarkable technology, and its enduring place in Jaigarh's legacy.

Where: Jaigarh (Meeting Point: Outside Cannon Foundry | Parking: Tanka Chowk)
When: Saturday, 4 July 2026
Time: 8:30 AM – 10:00 AM

Registration: Register through the link in our bio.".

title: UDBHAV 2026 an Painting Exhibit at JKK
venue: Surekh Art Gallery, Jawahar Kala Kendra (JKK), Jaipur
caption_full:
UDBHAV 2026 is a celebration of artistic expression, where every canvas tells a unique story.

Join us for a two-day exhibition showcasing original works by emerging artists from the Certificate Programme in Painting at the Indian Institute of Crafts & Design.

📍 Surekh Art Gallery, Jawahar Kala Kendra (JKK), Jaipur
📅 4–5 July 2026
🕙 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Inauguration: 4 July • 11:00 AM

Come, experience the beauty of colour, form, and imagination.

#UDBHAV2026 #IICD #PaintingExhibition #ArtExhibition #Jaipur JKK IndianArt EmergingArtists FineArts CreativeJourney ArtLovers JaipurEvents CanvasStories IndianInstituteOfCraftsAndDesign".

title: Rama Heritage Walk
caption_full:
"Every street has a story. Every creator sees it differently. 🏛️✨

Join the RAMA Heritage Walk as we explore the timeless charm of Jaipur—through art, architecture, conversations, and creativity.

📍 Route: Choti Chaupar → Sarga Suli → City Palace → Govind Dev Ji Temple → Hawa Mahal → Samrat Kachori

🗓️ 5th July 2026
⏰ 6:30 AM

Bring your camera, sketchbook, or simply your curiosity. Let's walk, connect, and create together.

#RAMA #HeritageWalk #Jaipur #WalkConnectCreate #CreativeCommunity".

title: Jaipur Photographers Club Photowalk
venue: MSB Ka Rasta, Jhori Bazar, Jaipur
caption_full:
"𝐉𝐏𝐂 𝐂𝐡𝐢𝐭𝐫𝐚 𝐓𝐚𝐡𝐚𝐥: 𝐒𝐇𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐒
Great photographs begin with the ability to see.

Lines, curves, light, shadows, and geometry surround us every day, waiting to be noticed.

Join us for JPC Chitra Tahal as we explore the art of finding compelling compositions through shapes hidden in the streets of Jaipur.

📍 MSB Ka Rasta, Jhori Bazar, Jaipur
📅 5th July '26 | 7:00 AM
📌 Meeting Point: LMB Hotel
🌧️ Subject to Rain

Open & Free for All

#JPCChitraTahal #JaipurPhotographersClub #Shapes #JPCRocks".
